<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Octenium](https://octenium.com/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/octenium/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "octenium"
  dnsCredentials:
    # OCTENIUM_API_KEY: API key
    apiKey: ""
    # OCTENIUM_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # OCTENIUM_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # OCTENIUM_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 120)
    ttl: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
